## Use Case

## Scope and Safety

- Would this require reading from or writing to keyboard configuration? yes / no / unsure
- Safety considerations:

## Current Workaround

How do you handle this today?

## Safety Reminder

Hardware-write features are not implemented in the public alpha. Any future hardware-write or protocol work needs documented research, explicit maintainer approval, and Red Team safety review before implementation.
